reference: It is a very common problem and yes, it is curable. You can apply Lacto Calamine at night for two weeks and take any antihistamine once a day for one week. It should subside by then.
text: It is a very common problem, and yes, it is curable. You can apply lacto calcium at night for two weeks and take any antihistamine once a day for one week. It should subside by then.
